personal.name: Muhammad Aulia
personal.bio: Passionate graphic designer and active Canva user since 2019. I specialize in turning complex ideas into clean, engaging visuals. I am eager to step up as a Template Creator to design high-quality, versatile templates that help users worldwide bring their ideas to life.

services.title: Brand Identity Design
services.description: Logo, color palette, typography, and full brand guidelines tailored to your business personality and target audience.

services.title: Social Media Content
services.description: Eye-catching Instagram posts, stories, reels covers, and feed layouts that grow your audience and boost engagement.

services.title: Wedding & Event Design
services.description: Elegant invitations, save-the-dates, digital wedding packages, and event collateral with a personal touch.

services.title: Print & Marketing Material
services.description: Brochures, flyers, posters, and promotional materials optimized for both print and digital distribution.

services.title: Presentation Design
services.description: Professional, visually compelling slide decks for business pitches, reports, and corporate presentations.

services.title: Template Creation
services.description: Reusable, fully editable Canva templates designed to help creators and entrepreneurs maintain consistent branding.

testimonials.quote: Muhammad Aulia delivered stunning wedding invitations that perfectly captured our love story. Every detail was spot-on, and the response from our guests was overwhelming!
testimonials.name: Siti Rahayu

testimonials.quote: Our Umrah promotional materials looked incredibly professional. Alfan understood our brand instantly and produced designs that genuinely resonated with our clients.
testimonials.name: Ustadz Fauzi

testimonials.quote: The Canva templates he created for our brand saved us hours every week. They're beautiful, easy to edit, and our social media has never looked more cohesive.
testimonials.name: Rina Kusuma

testimonials.quote: Fast turnaround, great communication, and the final poster exceeded all expectations. Highly recommend for any print or social media design needs!
testimonials.name: Ahmad Rizky

experience.description: Founded a creative studio focused on branding, social media content, and Canva template design.
Designing elegant wedding invitations, branding materials, and social media content.
Created promotional graphics, brochures, and social media assets for Hajj & Umrah packages.
